summary: Added a lane-local Minigame Forge panel that shows each selected path's game module blueprint, generated texture, stage count, asset coverage, extension files, and local GAME/ASSET/ARCADE jumps.

pattern_notes: Reusable extension surfaces work best when the UI makes extension points and configuration targets visible.
SaaS dashboards should foreground decision-driving metrics and actions rather than hiding setup paths in documentation only.
Game module and card UI benefits from strong artwork, compact stats, and clear next actions.
The Atlas forge should show the exact files and registry hooks a future lane needs without performing code generation or side effects.

data_contract: minigameForgeStats(lane) derives module type, stage count, asset count, and status from existing visual and registry data.
minigameForgeFiles(lane) lists the reusable extension targets: lane visuals, MINIGAME_REGISTRY, web/app.js, and web/games/README.md.
renderMinigameForge(lane) appears in Overview after Agent Party and before the legacy World Module.
GAME, ASSET, and ARCADE actions only navigate local Atlas surfaces and do not mutate snapshot data.
ui_notes: The panel uses the selected lane's generated minigame texture as the primary visual signal.
File chips wrap long paths so extension instructions remain readable in narrow detail panes.
The responsive board stacks artwork and blueprint copy on mobile while preserving four stats and four file chips.

red.result: Expected failure before implementation: panel false, texture false, stats 0, files 0, actions []

green.result: ok true; panel true; texture true; title Venue Mapper; stats 4; files 4; completeFiles 3; actions [arcade,asset,game]; GAME opened Game view; ASSET activated game asset filter; ARCADE scrolled to Arcade Deck; no clipped text or console errors.

responsive: phone 390: ok true, panel true, texture true, boardColumns 1, statColumns 2, fileColumns 2, actions 3, pageOverflow false, clipped []
tablet 820: ok true, panel true, texture true, boardColumns 1, statColumns 2, fileColumns 2, actions 3, pageOverflow false, clipped []
desktop 1280: ok true, panel true, texture true, boardColumns 2, statColumns 4, fileColumns 2, actions 3, pageOverflow false, clipped []
wide 1600: ok true after file-path wrapping fix, panel true, texture true, boardColumns 2, statColumns 4, fileColumns 2, actions 3, pageOverflow false, clipped []
static: ASCII verified for web/index.html, web/app.js, web/styles.css, web/README.md

next_actions: Add a generated future-slot texture preview for lanes without a custom minigame texture.
Add a lane-local module skin switcher for future minigame families.
Extract minigame renderers into separate files when the repo adds a bundler or static module loader.
